{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/28-appendix-a-minimal-working-example.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Appendix A: Minimal Working Example"
tags:
  * ingestion
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Appendix A: Minimal Working Example


h2. Contents

* [Appendix A: Minimal Working Example|#appendix-a-minimal-working-example]
  * [A.1. Minimal nautilus.json|#a1-minimal-nautilusjson]
  * [A.2. Minimal Adapter|#a2-minimal-adapter]
  * [A.3. Minimal Passport|#a3-minimal-passport]



{quote}"adapter": "adapters/my_notes.py",{quote}

----





h2. Appendix A: Minimal Working Example

h3. A.1. Minimal {{nautilus.json}}

{code:language=json}
{
  "protocol_version": "1.0",
  "ecosystem_name": "example",
  "repositories": [
    {
      "name": "my_notes",
      "format": ".md",
      "adapter": "adapters/my_notes.py",
      "compatibility_level": 2
    }
  ]
}
{code}

h3. A.2. Minimal Adapter

{code:language=python}
from pathlib import Path
from base import BaseAdapter, PortalEntry


class MyNotesAdapter(BaseAdapter):
    name = "my_notes"
    
    def __init__(self, repo_path):
        self.repo_path = Path(repo_path)
    
    def describe(self):
        md_files = list(self.repo_path.glob("**/*.md"))
        return {
            "name": self.name,
            "format": ".md",
            "total_entries": len(md_files),
            "topics": []
        }
    
    def fetch(self, query):
        results = []
        for path in self.repo_path.glob("**/*.md"):
            text = path.read_text()
            if query.lower() in text.lower():
                results.append(PortalEntry(
                    repo_name=self.name,
                    native_id=str(path.relative_to(self.repo_path)),
                    title=path.stem,
                    summary=text[:280],
                    content=text,
                    tags=[],
                    confidence=1.0,
                    native_metadata={"path": str(path)},
                    url=None
                ))
        return results
{code}

h3. A.3. Minimal Passport

{code:language=markdown}
# my_notes

<!-- similar-docs -->

---

**Похожие документы:**
- [[98-appendix-a-minimal-working-example]] (сходство 0.44)
- [[03-portal-protocol-md]] (сходство 0.18)
- [[123-portal-mcp-py]] (сходство 0.17)


<!-- see-also -->

---

**Смотрите также:**
- [[98-appendix-a-minimal-working-example]]
- [[123-portal-mcp-py]]
- [[03-portal-protocol-md]]
- [[105-review-methodology-md]]

<!-- backlinks-auto -->
## Упоминается в

- [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]

<!-- related-auto -->
## Связанные документы

- [[190-содержание|Содержание]] _33%_
- [[22-10-queryresult-structure|10. QueryResult Structure]] _33%_
- [[122-глоссарий|Глоссарий]] _29%_
- [[125-readme-mcp-md-инструкция-по-установке|README-MCP.md— инструкция по установке]] _29%_
